title: MD
biography: Carl Jung was a Swiss psychiatrist who founded analytical psychology. He developed concepts of archetypes, the collective unconscious, and psychological types that have deeply influenced psychology and culture.
aiSummary: Carl Jung is a psychiatry specialist at University of Zurich. Based in Zurich.

timeline.title: Founded analytical psychology
timeline.description: Published Symbols of Transformation, breaking from Freud and establishing his own school

timeline.title: Published Psychological Types
timeline.description: Introduced introversion/extroversion and psychological type theory
